net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math

Class Vector3D

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.Vector
      • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.util.math.Vector3D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<Vector>

    public class Vector3D
extends Vector
    This class is a 3 dimensional subclass of the Vector.

    0.5

    marc.engelmann
